boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-FJO-086 pending; STD-FJO-086-P exact match required.

final_answer: Source records indicate that deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 is incomplete due to a pending retest result for assay AX-41. The policy STD-FJO-086-P mandates full assay-acceptance status verification before shipment. Consequently, the action boundary remains open, and the process must escalate for a definitive acceptance status.
